Search a city or use your location to find free water nearby.

A community-powered water initiative

Clean water should be free.
Help us make that true, everywhere.

We map public drinking water worldwide, set up free water stations at events, and build permanent access points in communities that need them.

Find water

Search any city on earth. Real-time water sites from open public data — no login, no fee.

Events & stations

We run free water stations at festivals, marathons, markets, and community events worldwide.

Build access

We design and install permanent free water infrastructure in public spaces where none exists.

Community-powered water access

Clean water should be free.
Help us build that world.

FreeWaterSite maps free drinking water worldwide, runs water stations at events, and builds permanent access points where communities need them most. We're volunteer-run. Every dollar goes directly to the mission.

100% of donations fund water access directly — zero overhead, zero salaries.

Map the world's free water
Fund free event water stations
Build permanent water access
$
Secure via Stripe Cancel anytime Volunteer-run
